detail.description:
Escape the everyday with Color Block Run: Addictive, calming puzzles that challenge your brain and soothe your soul.
Experience the satisfying crunch of logic as you slide blocks, clear space, and outsmart clever obstacles. Each solved puzzle delivers a rewarding mental boost!

Key Features:
Endless Evolving Challenges: Hundreds of levels from relaxing to intensely complex. Regular free updates!
Soothing Visual Escape: Clean, minimalist design with beautiful, calming color palettes. A true visua
detail.releaseNotes:
New Update: Color Block Run - Better Performance, Endless Puzzles! 

~Massive Content Library:
Test your spatial reasoning and puzzle strategy across over 900 unique challenges! Yes, that's 900+ levels of pure logic game fun waiting for you.

~Performance Upgrade:
Optimized for faster loading and smoother block movement. Enjoy a more fluid color block matching experience!

~User Interface Refinements:
Minor visual tweaks and improvements to make navigating our vast library of brain teasers more pleasant.

~Stability Improvements:
Fixed several small bugs and enhanced overall stability for an uninterrupted puzzle session.

Update Now and Keep Running Through the Puzzles!

eventMentions.text: i’m at level 455 and the last levels keep repeating! there is no new content at this level!
